description: You are a clinical documentation specialist. Format the hospital discharge summary at /home/ga/Documents/discharge_summary_raw.odt according to the style guide at /home/ga/Desktop/hospital_style_guide.txt. Apply all five requirements: title formatting, demographics table creation, heading application, bulleted medication list creation, and emphasis of the critical warning sentence. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/discharge_summary_raw.odt.

metadata.warning_text: Return to emergency room if experiencing severe shortness of breath
